message:
test(fcp-core): pin ConnectorTarget shape + ManifestVersion compatibility selector matrix (flywheel_connectors-46kt1)

Bead asks for ManifestSelector JSON+CBOR roundtrip pinning. No type
literally named ManifestSelector exists in fcp-core. Manifest selection
is performed by RegistryEntry keys (id + version + target). Per-axis
selector shapes: ConnectorTarget at connector_artifacts.rs:81 (os+arch)
+ ManifestVersion at connector_artifacts.rs:19 (version with
is_compatible_with selector predicate stricter than plain semver).

Existing connector_bundle_serde_extended.rs covers RegistryEntry full
shape. This pin adds residual axes: ConnectorTarget standalone JSON +
CBOR shape per os/arch combo, as_string() format, from_env normalization
(x86_64→amd64, aarch64→arm64), HashMap-key behavior. ManifestVersion
#[serde(transparent)] scalar string form, Display + FromStr fixed
point, CBOR Text scalar, Ord matches semver ordering. Critical:
is_compatible_with selector truth table — same-major equal/higher
compatible, same-major lower NOT compatible, different-major NEVER
compatible (loud cross-major sentinel: even strictly higher across
major bump is rejected, the documented rule "stricter than plain
semantic-version ordering"). Zero-major handling. ConnectorVersion
type-alias compatibility. Invalid-semver-rejection sentinel.

20 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-46kt1 cargo test -p
fcp-core --test manifest_selector_serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
